sys_hub_flow.description: Execute all actions required after a successful donation: update blood request, create donation history, update donor profile, update blood inventory.
sys_hub_flow.name: Complete Donation Process

sys_hub_flow_snapshot.description: Execute all actions required after a successful donation: update blood request, create donation history, update donor profile, update blood inventory.
sys_hub_flow_snapshot.name: Complete Donation Process

sys_hub_flow_input.label: Appointment Record
